title: U.S. troops killed amid Iranian counterattack, fueling air defense fears
author: Alex Horton, Tara  Copp, Dan Lamothe
fullText: U.S. forces say they have hit 1,000 targets over the past two days in a race to take out Iran’s ability to threaten American personnel and allies across the Middle East.
summary: U.S. forces say they have hit 1,000 targets over the past two days in a race to take out Iran’s ability to threaten American personnel and allies across the Middle East.
